M.A.M.M.B.A — Agent Diagnostics
All checks run server-side from inside your app — tests every API key and connection live.
Supabase — lead database
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL · SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY

Anthropic Claude — AI email generation
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Pending
Resend — email delivery

Pending
Twilio — SMS messages
TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID · TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN · TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER

Slybroadcast — ringless voicemail
SLYBROADCAST_EMAIL · SLYBROADCAST_PASSWORD · SLYBROADCAST_PHONE

Bland.ai — AI outbound calls
BLAND_API_KEY
Pending
All required environment variables
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URLsupabase.com → Project → Settings → API
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEYsupabase.com → Project → Settings → API
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEYsupabase.com → Project → Settings → API
ANTHROPIC_API_KEYconsole.anthropic.com → API Keys
RESEND_API_KEYresend.com → API Keys
FROM_EMAILYour verified sending email
FROM_NAMEM.A.M.M.B.A Enterprises LLC
TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SIDconsole.twilio.com → Account Info
TWILIO_AUTH_TOKENconsole.twilio.com → Account Info
TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBERYour Twilio number (+15551234567)
SLYBROADCAST_EMAILYour slybroadcast.com login email
SLYBROADCAST_PASSWORDYour slybroadcast.com password
SLYBROADCAST_PHONEYour verified caller ID (+15551234567)
BLAND_API_KEYapp.bland.ai → API Keys
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URLYour Vercel deployment URL
CRON_SECRETAny random string (openssl rand -hex 32)
